raw_title: The Time Dimension of Visual Journalism: The Rhythm of Photographic “Truth Claims”
title_en: The Time Dimension of Visual Journalism: The Rhythm of Photographic “Truth Claims”
title_zh: 视觉新闻的时间维度：摄影“真相主张”的节奏
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了视觉新闻中照片如何通过时间节奏来构建和传达“真相主张”。它分析了摄影在新闻报道中如何随时间变化影响观众对真实性的感知。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how photographs in visual journalism construct and convey 'truth claims' through temporal rhythms. It analyzes how photography in news reporting influences audience perceptions of authenticity over time.
research_direction_zh: 视觉新闻与媒体研究，关注摄影在新闻报道中的时间动态和真实性构建。
research_direction_en: Visual journalism and media studies, focusing on temporal dynamics and authenticity construction in photojournalism.
